title: Redesign Login Page Button and License Agreement Text
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the login page to have a clean 'Continue' button with simplified license agreement text, so that the login experience is professional and aligned with Salesforce conventions.
description:
The login page was updated to align more closely with the Salesforce login pattern:

1. **Button text**: Changed from the green "Connect" button to a "Continue" button
2. **Button styling**: Changed to a grey outline style to match the Salesforce aesthetic
3. **License text**: Simplified to: *'By clicking "Continue" you agree to our License Agreement'*

This change also establishes a foundation for future authentication options beyond Salesforce.
acceptance_criteria: Login button text reads 'Continue' instead of 'Connect'
Button has a grey outline style matching Salesforce login aesthetics
Below the button, text reads: 'By clicking "Continue" you agree to our License Agreement'
ux_changes: Login page button changed from green 'Connect' to grey-outlined 'Continue'. License agreement text simplified. Layout aligned with Salesforce login conventions.
implementation_notes: The button outline was initially green but was changed to grey to match the Salesforce style after feedback.
comment_summary: Developer deployed the button change. Reporter requested the button outline color be changed from green to grey to match Salesforce. Fix was applied promptly.
